query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.status, pp.id as photo_id, pp.subcategory, pp.category, pp.stage, pp.createdAt 
FROM projects p 
LEFT JOIN projectPhotos pp ON p.id = pp.projectId 
WHERE p.name LIKE '%lvaro%' OR p.name LIKE '%prueba%'
ORDER BY pp.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
